title: SBSHealth
text:
SBSHealth SBSHealth We are compassionate listeners. We listen the issues of our patients, respect them, and 
      do everything in our power to help. Contact Info Balajee Hospital Shah Arcade, 3, Rani Sati Rd, near Passport Office, Malad East, Mumbai, Maharashtra, 400097 SBS Hospital BLOCK-B, C wing, Off Veera Desai Rd, behind Balaji Studio, Veera Desai Industrial Estate, Andheri West, Mumbai, Maharashtra, 400053 Lion Kartar Singh charitable Hospital (ICU Unit) managed by SBS group 1st Floor, 6- B, Dadabhai Cross Rd, near Navrang Talkies, Gilbert Hill, Andheri West, Mumbai, Maharashtra, 400058 About Us Insurance Tie-ups Feedback Pay Online Make an Enquiry Doctor Blogs +9137527180 Find a Doctor Medical Services Hospitals & Directions Book an Appointment Contact Us Welcome To SBSHealth SBS group has started its hospital industry journey with a 10 bedded hospital in mumbai 12 years ago
              with high ambition and a strong purpose to serve people by the founder director Mr. Shashi Bhushan
              Sharma. Now with his clear vision and sharp entrepreneurial skill SBS GROUP is managing 5 hospitals pan
      India having more than 450 beds and his vision is that SBS group shall be having of 20 hospitals by
      2030 with total bed capacity of more than 2000. Read more... Our Values We believe that patients deserve to have timely access to health care and that our systems should 
                        Reflect this value. Read more Our Facilities Well qualified specialty and super-specialty doctors are attached with hospital. Read more Why Choose Us? We provide patient-centered service. People who come to the Balajee Hospital can expect polite, friendly helpful staff members who relate to each person as an individual, recognizing their history, relationships, culture, and needs. We go the extra mile to meet their expectations. We use innovative approaches to health care and customer service. OPD Services IPD Services Surgical Services Critical Care Service Diagnostic Services 24-hour Pharmacy Services Our Clinical Departments Explore Our Departments! SBSHealth provides international standards of clinical excellence and trust. Our team is committed to provide unparalleled patient care in an ultramodern facility.. Medicine and Critical Care Gynaecology and Obstetrics General Surgerys Orthopaedics and Pain Management Urology Oncology Neurology Gastroenterology Otolaryngology (ENT) Dermatology Pediatrics Cardiology Nephrology Neuro - Psychiatric Diagnostic and Pathology Our Team of Doctors At SBSHealth, Our specialist doctors have more than a decade of experience in treating patients. Our topmost priority is the comfort and well-being of the patients. Dr. Devendra Patel Consulting Physician Dr. C. B.
